result.measured_on: real target files at pinned vuln/patched SHAs (line-precise sink rediscovery)

reproducibility: Each entry pins a real repo + vulnerable/patched commit SHAs. The detector runs over the real trees fetched at those SHAs. An entry that cannot be resolved to fetchable ground truth at build time is dropped from the denominator with a reason (never counted missed, never hand-faked).

seed.sink: mergeMappings: destination[key] = source[key] (unguarded computed-member assignment of a parsed key)
seed.patched_shape: setProperty() special-cases __proto__ via Object.defineProperty; the raw assignment is replaced by setProperty(destination, key, source[key])
seed.notes: The direct-mapping path (storeMappingPair) already guarded __proto__; only the YAML merge (<<) path was unguarded. The class rule must flag the unguarded sink even when sibling paths are guarded.

heldout.sink: unflatten()/hydrate() reviver: unguarded object[key] = hydrate(n) inside for (const key in value)
heldout.patched_shape: key skiplist guard that throws on __proto__ before the copy; typeof index === 'number' check

heldout.sink: baseUnset(object, path): unconditional delete object[toKey(last(path))] on an attacker-controlled path (pollution via property deletion into __proto__/constructor.prototype)
heldout.notes: sink is DELETION, not assignment — a class rule must cover delete obj[key], not just obj[key]=v

heldout.sink: removeAttributeNS: attributes = this._attributes[namespace]; delete attributes[name] with namespace='__proto__' resolving to Object.prototype
heldout.patched_shape: hasOwnProperty own-property filter on the namespace key
heldout.measured: MISS: the patch guards via this._attributes.hasOwnProperty(namespace); a bare hasOwnProperty is indistinguishable from the benign duplicate-key check in the seed without control-flow polarity analysis, so DT-PP-MERGE flags both vuln and patched. A documented held-out miss -> future improvement-loop fixture.

heldout.drop_reason: NVD has no CVE record (authoritative HTTP 200, totalResults=0, not a rate-limit); no resolvable fix commit
NVD has no CVE record (authoritative HTTP 200, totalResults=0, not a rate-limit); no resolvable fix commit

denominator_note: Generalization denominator = 3 pinned held-out CVEs (devalue, lodash, min-document). 2 dropped for no authoritative NVD record — reported as coverage, never counted as missed.
